Acme Robotics announced today that its new warehouse robot, the AcmeBot 3000, will ship in March 2027 at a price of $4,999. CEO Jane Smith said the robot can lift 50 kilograms and operate for 12 hours on a single charge. The company is based in Austin, Texas, and was founded in 2019. Early customers include several large logistics firms piloting the units in regional distribution centers.
